requirements.summary: Fix contact form submission error by investigating and correcting the form submission logic in ContactSection.tsx and useSubmitContactForm hook, ensuring successful backend submission and proper success message display
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the contact form with valid data does not display an error alert
A success message is displayed after a successful form submission
The backend correctly receives and stores the submitted form data
The submitContactForm mutation in useQueries.ts resolves without error for valid input
Form validation errors are shown inline and do not trigger the submission error path

file_operations.description: Fix the useSubmitContactForm mutation to correctly call the backend submitContactForm function with properly formatted parameters matching the backend interface signature. Ensure all form fields are passed in the correct order (firstName, lastName, state, productInterest, coverageAmount, age, gender, additionalComments, bestTimeToContact, bestDayToContact) and that numeric values are converted to BigInt. Add proper error handling to distinguish between validation errors and submission errors.

Update the form submission handler to properly handle the mutation response, displaying a success message when submission completes successfully instead of showing an error alert. Ensure form validation runs before submission and displays inline validation errors without triggering the submission error path. Add a success state that shows a confirmation message to the user after successful form submission. Verify that all form field values are collected and passed to the mutation in the correct format.
